title: SPP Interchange Real Time CSV download
description:
SPP interchange tie flow from neighboring RTOs and balancing authorities. Data is sampled every minute. Negative values indicate SPP importing and positive values indicate SPP exporting.

Locations include: 
* SPP_NSI: Southwest Power Pool Net Schedule Interchange
* SPP_NAI: Southwest Power Pool Net Actual Interchange
* AECI: Associated Electric Cooperative Inc
* AMRN: Ameren Transmission
* BLKW: Blackwater DC Tie
* CLEC: Central Louisiana Electric Company
* EDDY: Eddy DC Tie
* EES: Entergy Electric System
* ERCOTE: Welch/ERCOTEast DC Tie
* ERCOTN: Oklaunion/ERCOT North DC Tie
* LAMAR: Lamar DC Tie
* MEC: Mid-American Energy Company
* SCSE: Sydney DC Tie
* SOUC: Southern Company
* SPA: Southwestern Power Administration
* TVA: Tennessee Valley Authority
* RCEAST: Rapid City DC Tie
* SPC: Saskatchewan Power Co
* MCWEST: Miles City DC Tie
* SGE: Stegall
* ALTW: Alliant Energy
* DPC: Dairyland Power Cooperative
* GRE: Great River Energy
* MDU: Montana Dakota Utilities
* NSP: Northern States Power Company
* OTP: Otter Tail Power Company
